name: Brownies (Radis)
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients in a blender and mix well.
2. Spray 2 mini-loaf pans with Pam.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared pans.
4. Bake at 350°F for 18 minutes. Do not over bake. The brownies should be chewy.
5. Each serving contains: 1 egg, 1 package Chocolate alba, 1/2 cup applesauce, and 14 calories.
